source: Hyvä release notes + OSV cross-reference (manual curation)

hyva-themes/magento2-default-theme.note: Pre-1.3.6 ships a vulnerable AlpineJS bundle (CVE proxy IC-060 catches the JS dep, IC-912 catches the Magento package floor).

hyva-themes/magento2-hyva-checkout.note: Pre-1.1.16 has a documented XSS regression in the address-edit flow; upgrade is the only mitigation.
